scientific_question: Can recirculation severity be quantified across Salt cases enough to justify disabling ordinary single-stream upcomer closures and motivating a throughflow-plus-exchange model?
analysis_needed: From existing S13 and velocity packages, compile or compute recirculation fraction/proxy availability, y-velocity sign structure, exchange proxy, tau proxy, near-onset anchor status, and same-QOI UQ availability. Fail closed if a true recirculation fraction is not defensible.
figures_tables_needed: Four-case side_z y-velocity and |U| panels; recirculation proxy table; ordinary-closure disable table; onset/anchor status table.
why_it_enriches_thesis: Turns the attractive upcomer pictures into a scrutinizable model-validity result rather than a visual anecdote.
guardrail: No ordinary Nu/f_D/K admission; no exchange coefficient admission; no source-side heatflow relabel as wall heat flux.

scientific_question: Which heat paths own thermal residuals before any coefficient is fitted?
analysis_needed: Trace heater, cooler/HX, passive wall, test section, junction/stub, external radiation/convection, source/sink, and residual lanes by source package; collect exact known values and missing fields.
figures_tables_needed: Heat-path owner matrix; residual owner waterfall; source/path provenance table; runtime-forbidden audit.
why_it_enriches_thesis: Lets Chapter 7 discuss thermal physics rigorously even without a final passive-wall closure.
guardrail: No realized CFD wallHeatFlux as runtime input; no validation temperatures as inputs; no residual absorption into internal Nu.

scientific_question: What pressure evidence supports a source-envelope ladder rather than component K or global multipliers?
analysis_needed: Consolidate pressure basis equations, hydrostatic/kinetic/straight/developing/section-effective terms, negative component-K attempts, two-tap residuals, F6 gate status, and missing same-QOI UQ.
figures_tables_needed: Pressure-basis ladder figure/table; lower-right residual table; F3/F6 not-evaluated status table; non-admission table.
why_it_enriches_thesis: Makes negative pressure work a positive thesis contribution and prevents basis-mismatched claims.
guardrail: No component K/F6/clipped-K/hidden multiplier admission; no validation/holdout/external tuning.

scientific_question: What source/property labels are missing before any candidate can be frozen?
analysis_needed: Audit nominal Salt1-4 train rows and candidate lanes for property model, source family, row role, fit permission, score permission, and missing labels.
figures_tables_needed: Source/property release atlas; train/support/protected split table; S11/S15 blocker table.
why_it_enriches_thesis: Turns the final-scorecard blocker into an auditable release problem instead of vague incompleteness.
guardrail: No broad protected-row release; no candidate freeze without exactly one named candidate.

scientific_question: What small files can safely live in the LaTeX repo so external writers can work without raw CFD dumps?
analysis_needed: Inventory ready CSV/MD/TEX evidence ledgers, estimate sizes if copied, propose target `evidence/` or appendix paths, and map each to chapters.
figures_tables_needed: Compact evidence manifest; copy/no-copy decision table; appendix inclusion plan; papers-board import rows.
why_it_enriches_thesis: Creates a sustainable external-writer workflow: small, reviewable evidence packets in LaTeX, raw data stays in ethan_runs.
guardrail: No huge raw CFD, no generated figure tree dumps, no native output copies, no unreviewed LaTeX import.

scientific_question: What equations, symbols, sign conventions, and assumptions must every writer use consistently?
analysis_needed: Consolidate fluid+walls balances, pressure loss forms, heat-path balances, recirculation/exchange definitions, residual terms, split labels, admission labels, and runtime-forbidden variables.
figures_tables_needed: Definitions table; symbol/unit glossary; governing equation ledger; sign convention figure/table.
why_it_enriches_thesis: Prevents external prose from drifting scientifically and gives reviewers one place to audit terminology.
guardrail: Do not define a model term as admitted merely because it appears in the governing equation ledger.

scientific_question: Which CFD artifacts can support motivation, diagnostics, fitting, scoring, figures, and limitations?
analysis_needed: Create per-artifact legal-use matrix for 3D paper figures/tables, Salt-family cases, validation/external visual assets, and thesis work-products.
figures_tables_needed: CFD legal-use table; case role table; figure source manifest; allowed/forbidden claim table.
why_it_enriches_thesis: Lets external writers describe CFD evidence accurately without seeing raw case trees.
guardrail: No experimental-validation claim; no external-test rows used for training or model selection.
